mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM notification_record WHERE triggered_event_id = #{eventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_record (id, tenant_id, channel, recipient, subject, body, status, error_message, triggered_by, triggered_event_id, occurred_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.tenantId}, #{row.channel}, #{row.recipient}, #{row.subject}, #{row.body}, #{row.status}, #{row.errorMessage}, #{row.triggeredBy}, #{row.triggeredEventId}, #{row.occurredAt})
